name: mutsukicore-test-io
description: Process I/O test harness tools for MutsukiCore.

interface.shortDescription: Run test processes and capture I/O for MutsukiCore.
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for running commands, driving interactive processes, and sending JSONL requests while keeping MutsukiCore runtime core domain-neutral.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use MutsukiCore Test I/O to run backend smoke tests.
